name: GLM-4.5V
tagline: 106B (12B active) open-source vision-reasoning model with thinking mode, built on the GLM-4.
metaDescription: GLM-4.5V (Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM)), released 2025-08-11 — part of the GLM-V (vision-language) line. 106B (12B active) open-source vision-reasoning model with thinki…
overview: GLM-4.5V is a large language model from Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM), part of the GLM-V (vision-language) line. Released 2025-08-11. Open-weight vision-language models for multimodal reasoning, GUI agents and document/image understanding.
What's notable in this version: 106B (12B active) open-source vision-reasoning model with thinking mode, built on the GLM-4.5-Air base; SoTA across many open-model vision benchmarks.
